stemHtml: How can the TCS (Touch Control Steering) system be activated?

options.a: By using a touchpad instead of a control stick/wheel to control the aircraft.
options.b: By pressing a button to disengage the flight controls from the autopilot.
options.c: By using a separate set of flight controls to provide the autopilot with new control inputs.
options.d: When the pilot touches the flight controls, the autopilot is automatically disengaged.
